input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.15.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.15.1.2
            TITLE: reinspection must be completed to restore inspection approval, if voided

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.15.1.2: Reinspection must be completed to restore Inspection Approval, if voided
IN.15.1.2 Reinspection must be completed to restore Inspection Approval, if voided

final_answer: Reinspection must be completed to restore Inspection Approval, if voided
